title: Discrete-Time Exponential γⁿ
summary: This page introduces the discrete-time exponential γⁿ and shows its equivalence to the natural-base form e^{λn}, paralleling the continuous-time relation e^{λt} = γ^t. It provides numerical examples, a drill on converting among equivalent exponential forms, and begins discussing how the real part of λ determines growth, decay, or constant-amplitude oscillation.
